Milkshake Mania Wiki
Play
Wiki / Research

Research tree

The Research Lab opens at Level 6. Spend XP to level 15 nodes (each up to Level 3) across three tracks. There are no prerequisites — level nodes in any order. Bonuses compound with all your other multipliers.

Track 1

Production

Faster blends, bigger yields, more specials, cheaper bulk.

NodeEffect (L1 / L2 / L3)XP cost
Blend Optimization−8% / −15% / −22% blend time60 · 140 · 280
Yield Boost+10% / +20% / +30% manual income60 · 140 · 280
Special Batches+5% / +10% / +15% special chance80 · 180 · 360
Workforce Efficiency+5% / +10% / +15% passive income80 · 180 · 360
Bulk Procurement+3% / +6% / +10% bulk discount50 · 120 · 240
Track 2

Marketing

More fan favorites and goldens, bigger combo & country multipliers, faster XP.

NodeEffect (L1 / L2 / L3)XP cost
Fan Favorite Push+4% / +8% / +12% fan-favorite rate60 · 140 · 280
Golden Formula+2% / +4% / +6% golden chance80 · 180 · 360
Combo Mastery×1.05 / ×1.10 / ×1.15 combo bonus70 · 160 · 320
Global Outreach×1.03 / ×1.06 / ×1.10 country multiplier70 · 160 · 320
Staff Development+10% / +20% / +30% XP gains50 · 120 · 240
Track 3

Operations

Cheaper hires & upgrades, bigger event & contract rewards, lower tax.

NodeEffect (L1 / L2 / L3)XP cost
Hiring Pipeline−8% / −16% / −24% hire cost60 · 140 · 280
Crisis Management+10% / +20% / +30% event rewards60 · 140 · 280
Catering Expertise+15% / +30% / +50% contract reward80 · 180 · 360
Cost Reduction−5% / −10% / −15% upgrade cost70 · 160 · 320
Tax Optimization−3% / −6% / −9% tax rate80 · 180 · 360

Research is paid in XP, the same currency that drives your level — but spending it never lowers your level (level tracks lifetime XP). Plan around which bonuses move your numbers most.

Leveling & XPWhere XP comes from Shops & upgradesMoney upgrades
